message:
🐛 fix: cluster connectivity alerts notify once, not every 5 minutes (#2978)

Persistent cluster errors (unreachable, certificate) now fire a
browser notification only on first detection and suppress until
the cluster recovers. Previously they re-notified every 5 minutes
for the same ongoing failure, spamming the user with identical
alerts for dead/misconfigured clusters.

On recovery, the dedup entry is cleared so the next failure will
re-notify immediately.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
